_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 9 currently banned, 2885 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: Failed attempts at 19884 (up from 10151, +9733). fail2ban total bans 2885 (up from 2796, +89). 9 IPs currently banned (up from 7). Increased botnet scanning activity. Only authorized logins from novakj via publickey.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 25 usages across 7 files: viewer.js, upload.js, merge.js, annotate.js, pages.js, split.js, redact.js - all static templates, clearing operations, static SVGs, HTML entities, or integer-only interpolation. No user data injected unsafely. search.js and convert.js have zero innerHTML.

search_module_review.innerHTML_note: Zero innerHTML usages. Counter display uses textContent. Highlights rendered via createElement with className/style.
search_module_review.user_data_handling: Search query used only for indexOf string matching against pre-indexed text content. Never injected into HTML. Counter displayed via textContent. Highlight divs created via DOM APIs (createElement, className, style).
search_module_review.resource_cleanup: Search highlight layer removed on close/clear. No object URLs used.

convert_module_review.innerHTML_note: Zero innerHTML usages. Preview info and quality display use textContent. User feedback via showToast (textContent).
convert_module_review.user_data_handling: Format and DPI from controlled UI buttons (dataset attributes parsed with parseInt). Page range parsed with parseInt and bounds-checked against totalPages. JPEG quality parsed with parseFloat from range slider.
convert_module_review.object_url_note: URL.revokeObjectURL called at line 386 immediately after triggering download.
convert_module_review.clipboard_api: Uses navigator.clipboard.write with proper error handling and try/catch.

redact_module_review.redaction_limitation: Draws opaque rectangles but does NOT remove underlying content streams. Hidden data may still be extractable.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split and convert module downloads

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.
TASK-016 redaction tool draws opaque rectangles but does NOT strip underlying content streams - redacted text/images may still be extractable from the PDF file. Users should be warned.
notes: Full security review completed - 35 checks passed, 0 critical findings

Reviewed new search.js module (TASK-017): Zero innerHTML. Counter uses textContent. Search query only used for indexOf matching, never injected into HTML. Highlight divs created via DOM APIs. Fully secure.

Reviewed new convert.js module (TASK-014): Zero innerHTML. Preview info via textContent. sanitizeFilename for downloads. Object URLs revoked. parseInt/parseFloat with bounds checking. Clipboard API with error handling. Fully secure.
All 18 JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write(), or unsafe patterns found
25 innerHTML usages across 7 files - all verified safe (unchanged count; search.js and convert.js have zero)

SSH: Increased botnet scanning activity. Failed attempts up significantly to 19884 (+9733). fail2ban responding well with 2885 total bans (+89). 9 IPs currently banned. Only authorized logins from novakj via publickey.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (78 days remaining)
recommendations: MEDIUM: Add user-facing warning in redaction UI that underlying PDF data may not be fully removed - only visually covered.
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config (no scripts exist)
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
